claim_text: To test the hypothesis that in-domain DFDs have more utility as a DFD IQ metric than out-of-domain DFDs, we propose a self-supervised feature distance (SSFD \cite{adamson2021ssfd}) using an encoder $\phi_D^{(l)}$ trained in a self-supervised fashion on the same MR dataset $D$ used to train the reader study DL reconstruction models (described in Section \ref{sub:Recons}).
